title: Multi-Arm Multi-Stage Adaptive Platform Trial (APT) for the Acute Treatment of Traumatic Brain Injury

skipped_criteria: Inclusion #2: First dose must be within 24 hours of injury — temporal logic relative to injury time cannot be expressed with available fields.

Inclusion #2: Non-penetrating head injury warranting head CT per ACEP/CDC clinical policy — injury type specificity and clinical policy logic not expressible in schema (mechanism field only partially captures this; penetrating mechanisms excluded separately).

Inclusion #4: Specific neuroimaging findings (subarachnoid hemorrhage, contusion, subdural hematoma, petechial hemorrhage, intraventricular hemorrhage) on CT — no imaging-finding field exists beyond presumed_intracranial_hemorrhage, which is used as a proxy.
Inclusion #5: Initial GFAP blood level >100 pg/ml and ≤15,000 pg/ml — lab value field not available in schema.
Inclusion #6: Persons of childbearing potential must use adequate birth control — contraceptive compliance cannot be expressed in schema.
Inclusion #7: No MRI contraindications — no imaging contraindication field exists in schema.
Inclusion #8-10: Informed consent, language ability, and study compliance willingness — administrative/consent criteria not expressible in schema.
Exclusion #1: Isolated epidural hematoma — specific neuroimaging diagnosis not available as a schema field.

Exclusion #2: Pre-existing disabling developmental, neurologic, psychiatric, or medical disorder causing functional disability, or imminent death — no prior medical history or clinical prognosis fields in schema.
Exclusion #3: Current enrollment in another interventional study — no schema field for concurrent trial enrollment.
Exclusion #4: Currently breastfeeding or planning pregnancy in next 6 months — breastfeeding and future pregnancy intent not expressible in schema.
Exclusion #5: Current incarceration or in custody — no schema field for legal/custody status.
Exclusion #6: Currently prescribed one of the investigational products or contraindicated drugs prior to injury — no medication history field in schema.
Exclusion #7: Hypersensitivity or intolerance to investigational products — no allergy/hypersensitivity field in schema.
Exclusion #8: Renal dysfunction (CrCl or eGFR <60 mL/min/1.73m²) — no renal function lab field in schema.
Exclusion #9: Acute liver disease or hepatic dysfunction (ALT/AST >3x ULN) — no liver function lab field in schema.
Exclusion #10: Hemodynamic instability per physician clinical judgment — composite clinical judgment criterion; sbp_mmhg and hr_bpm exist but specific thresholds are not defined in the criterion.
Exclusion #11: Inability to swallow investigational product capsule — no swallowing ability field in schema.
Exclusion #12: Unable/unwilling to consume animal byproducts, gelatin allergy, or religious beliefs prohibiting gelatin — no dietary/religious preference field in schema.
Exclusion #13: Intolerance to small amounts of lactose — no lactose intolerance field in schema.
Exclusion #14: Low likelihood of follow-up or study compliance per investigator judgment — administrative/discretionary criterion not expressible in schema.
